title: neojobertia candolleana
intro: Neojobertia candolleana, also known as Job's tears, is a type of flowering plant in the Poaceae family, native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Neojobertia candolleana include its ability to help lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and stress. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tinctures, and capsules, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
